purpose: evidence-only comparison; this harness cannot select or adopt a production backend

candidates.usearch: 2.26.0, HNSW F32, cosine, default features disabled

shared_workload.selection: seeded nested real anchors; all catalog targets are force-included before the seeded fill
shared_workload.input_contract: one complete immutable CodeStory retrieval publication admitted through a pinned product query session; its vectors.sqlite3, vector-generation-manifest.json, core publication identity, live query-embedder identity, independently reviewable vector-free source-truth query catalog, and frozen query vectors generated before candidate timing
shared_workload.execution_contract: the orchestrator snapshots source, generation manifest, and fixture into one immutable evidence bundle; every child verifies that bundle, the exact binary digest, and macOS-arm64 host evidence before and after work

selection_requires: both clean evidence roots pass every declared workload and paired block
the source-truth catalog receives independent review
the immutable-generation, publication, rollback, corruption, cancellation, and concurrent-reader rows all pass
offline, license, native-dependency, archive-size, and later adoption integration evidence are complete
the candidate has a reversible fallback to the embedded scan

non_goals: using synthetic vectors as decision evidence
using a cache, hook, or workflow change to manufacture proof
